name: Order Log
creator: JD
description: Logs into ownerville, downloads the ORDER LOG tab from the ATT Tracker 2.1 - D2D Tableau workbook (filtered to Rafael Hidalgo, last month → today), and drops a polished color-coded .xlsx in your Downloads folder ready to paste into Slack.

checklist.text: Make sure your internet connection is stable — the script logs into Cloudflare-protected ownerville so a flaky connection breaks the run

The script opens its OWN Chrome window automatically and signs into ownerville + Tableau on its own. Leave that window alone while it runs (about 2 min). Do NOT open Reporting Chrome for this one — it uses a separate stealth Chrome (patchright).

breakdown:
WHAT IT DOES
Fills out the order log and downloads it to your computer's Downloads folder.

WHEN IT RUNS
Daily.

WHERE THE OUTPUT GOES
The finished `.xlsx` lands in your **Downloads** folder, named **`Order Log MM-DD-YYYY.xlsx`**.

FIRST-TIME SETUP
INPUT to Mac Terminal:
`./.venv/bin/patchright install chromium`

INPUT to Windows Command Prompt:
`.venv\Scripts\patchright install chromium`
followup_notes: Hardcoded credentials in the script — flagged to Megan for migration to env-var-based secrets in a follow-up commit.
